name: ETSY INC
summary: Etsy, Inc. operates two-sided online marketplaces connecting creative entrepreneurs with buyers worldwide. Its primary platform, the Etsy marketplace, serves as a global destination for unique, handmade, and vintage goods from independent sellers. Etsy also operates Depop, a fashion resale marketplace acquired in 2021, and previously operated Reverb (musical instruments, sold June 2025) and Elo7 (Brazil-based marketplace, sold August 2023). Total consolidated GMS in 2025 was $11.9 billion.

products.name: Etsy Marketplace
products.description: Global two-sided online marketplace connecting independent sellers of unique, creative, handmade, and vintage goods with buyers worldwide.

products.name: Depop
products.description: Leading fashion resale marketplace acquired in 2021; pending sale to eBay for $1.2 billion expected to close Q2 2026.

partnerships.description: Etsy entered a Sale and Purchase Agreement on February 15, 2026 for eBay to acquire Depop for $1.2 billion in cash.
